zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de la Haye於大約1085年出生在英國素可哈爾納可時，他的父親Raoul I de la Haye20歲，母親Olive de Ryes24歲。他和Muriel Lincoln至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1154年在英國英格蘭素可康普頓享年70歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪曼其雷賽。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de la Haye于大约1085年出生在英国素可哈爾納可时，他的父亲Raoul I de la Haye20岁，母亲Olive de Ryes24岁。他和Muriel Lincoln至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1154年在英国英格兰素可康普頓享年70岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪曼其雷賽。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Haye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.
German: variant of   Hey   4, 5.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de la Haye was born about 1085, in Halnaker, Sussex, England, his father, Raoul I de la Haye, was 20 and his mother, Olive de Ryes, was 24. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Muriel Lincoln. He died in 1154, in Compton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Lessay, Manche, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de la Haye est né environ 1085, à Halnaker, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Raoul I de la Haye, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Olive de Ryes, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Muriel Lincoln. Il est décédé en 1154, à Compton, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Lessay, Manche, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de la Haye um 1085 in Halnaker, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul I de la Haye 20 und seine Mutter Olive de Ryes 24. Er hatte mit Muriel Lincoln mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1154 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Compton, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lessay, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de la Haye è nato il circa 1085 nel Halnaker, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Raoul I de la Haye, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Olive de Ryes, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Muriel Lincoln. Morì nel 1154, nel Compton, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Lessay, Manche, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de la Hayeが約1085年にイギリススセックスハルナカーで生まれた時，父Raoul I de la Hayeは20歳，母Olive de Ryesは24歳であった。彼はMuriel Lincolnとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1154年にイギリスイギリススセックスコンプトンで70歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディマンチェレッサイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de la Haye(이)가 대략 1085년 영국 수세스 할나커에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul I de la Haye(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Olive de Ryes(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Muriel Lincoln(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 콤프턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 레지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de la Haye nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Halnaker, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Raoul I de la Haye, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Olive de Ryes, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Muriel Lincoln. Ele faleceu em 1154, em Compton, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Lessay, Manche, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de la Haye родился около 1085 г. в местности хэлнеикир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Raoul I de la Haye было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Olive de Ryes, 24. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Muriel Lincoln. Он умер в 1154 г. в местности комптон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности лессеи, манч, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de la Haye nació aproximadamente 1085, en Halnaker, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Raoul I de la Haye, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Olive de Ryes, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Muriel Lincoln. Murió en 1154, en Compton, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Lessay, Manche, Normandie, Francia.
